calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Mike Kelly'S Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Pay Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Off Calendar

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Elizabeth Johnson. Mike Kelly in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kelly stated that he had a problem with one sentence in the attachment to the order and requested striking the "whereas clause" referring to the Settlor's Attorney. Mr. Der stated that Mr. Vandersommen requested assistance with his finances, that he wanted his Niece to assist him, that he met with Mr. Vandersommen, that Mr. Vandersommen had no intention of objecting, that he explained the amendments to the trust without going over the entire trust and that he suggested Mr. Vandersommen seek assistance from another attorney. The Court granted the petition subject to Mr. Der removing the last "whereas" clause and review of the written order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Mike Kelly'S Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Pay Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Continued To Mar-04-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204

Notico Of Motion And Motion To Compel Petitioner To Respond To Interrogatoried And Pay Sanctions, No Response Having Been Made To Dste; Memorandum Of Poonts Ahd Authorities;And Declararion Of M.F. Kelly.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Text Ruling

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Continued To Feb-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Elizabeth Johnson. Michael Kelly in Propria Persona.

The Parties agreed to Mr. Der amending the petition removing the language Mr. Kelly is objecting to, to modifying the trust, to serving Micheal Kelly solely as Successor Trustee and to paying Mr. Kelly's costs. The matter was continued to February 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The discovery motion to compel answers to interrogatories was contiuned from Febraury 11, 2010 to March 4, 2010 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Notico Of Motion And Motion To Compel Petitioner To Respond To Interrogatoried And Pay Sanctions, No Response Having Been Made To Dste; Memorandum Of Poonts Ahd Authorities;And Declararion Of M.F. Kelly.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Continued To Jan-26-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, Petitioner Mike Kelly's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and pay sanctions, is continued to January 26, 2010 at 10:30 a.m. in Department 610. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Continued To Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Continued To Dec-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Nov-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Approval Of Proposed Act Of Attorney In Fact
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Elizabeth Johnson (Petitioner). Michael Kelly in Propria Persona (Respondent).

Mr. Der stated that he was willing to pay for Mr. Kelly's costs as long as Mr. Kelly withdraws his request for discovery. Mr. Kelly stated that he wanted some findings as to the allegations set forth in Mr. Der's petition. The matter was continued to October 19, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to talk and try to work it out. Mr. Der stated that he had a copy of the medical report done by the Institute on Aging that he was willing to submit in camera.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Maria Lertore, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
